creator: olivier@freenas.org
text:
Hi Robert,

> I just committed several changes to the i915 drm driver in CURRENT.  Not
> the least of which is an overhaul of the irq handler.  Can you see if
> that addresses the issue?

I've upgrade my FreeBSD to current:

[olivier@d630]~>uname -a
FreeBSD d630.freenas.org 8.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 8.0-CURRENT #1: Thu Feb 26
10:30:21 CET 2009     root@d630.freenas.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/DellD630
amd64

And with the current this problem is fixed: no more crash when clossing or
shuting down with gnome.

Thanks,

Olivier
